'''Krintrino''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. During the early stages of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces were responsible for the destruction of an [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] resistance cell that was based there, about [[5 BBY/Legends|five years prior]] to the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].
